falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in key support, contradicting the bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 20 billion shares
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would suggest extreme market stress, directly opposing the blowoff score's moderate urgency and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The US 10-year Treasury yield rises above 5.0% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal heightened risk aversion, contradicting the bottom pattern's implied stabilization and falsifying the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
